creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@John, please update either your Bugzilla account email address or the MAINTAINER lines in your ports to match each other, so that the Bugzilla Auto-Assigner (and triagers) can know when issues you submit are in fact by the maintainer of those ports.

Please also:

* Set maintainer-approval to + on attachments for ports you maintainAttachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+]
* Confirm these changes pass QA (portlint, poudriere)
